damage to their minds. This is very important for an astrologer.
HOW TO SUGGEST SOLUTIONS?
People, either knowingly or unknowingly commit lot of
mistakes in life-what are called the comedy of errors. Under such
situations, mind remains nonplussed-finding no way to move.
Because, the faculties of mind are highly perturbed, the nervous
radiations cannot get elevated, with the result proper thoughts or
solutions do not appear before the mind. The elevation of the mind
and its faculties takes place only when the hunian mind is Same.

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 9
Thoughts cannot go higher up, when the mind suffers frustration,
due to non-ventilation. In such cases, what is needed is ventilation
of mind to bring balanced thoughts. It is a well known fact that
mind can never be kept thought less in a wakeful state. In wakeful
state mind is restless, with thoughts coming like the waves in the
ocean.
